items.title: An Introduction to Bayesian Inference (David MacKay)
items.author: David J. C. MacKay
items.note: Chapter 2 develops Bayes' theorem with clear medical and coding examples; excellent bridge to ML.

items.title: Seeing Theory — Conditional Probability & Bayes
items.author: Brown University
items.note: Interactive visual introduction to conditional probability and Bayes' rule.

items.title: Introduction to Probability (Blitzstein & Hwang)
items.author: Joseph K. Blitzstein, Jessica Hwang
items.note: Stat 110 lecture notes include rigorous treatment of Bayes' theorem and total probability.

items.title: Bayes' Theorem (3Blue1Brown)
items.author: Grant Sanderson
items.note: Geometric intuition for why reversing conditional probability requires accounting for base rates.
